description.text: Asset Administration Shell for the Digital Quality Document.
Template submodel for Digital Quality Documents.
Set of document identifiers for the document. One ID in this collection should be used as a preferred ID
Information about a document identification entity
Identification of the domain in which the given DocumentId is unique. The domain ID can, e.g., be the name or acronym of the providing organisation
Alphanumeric character sequence uniquely identifying a document

Flag indicating whether a DocumentId within a collection of at least two DocumentIds is the ‘primary’ identifier for the document. This is the preferred ID of the document (commonly from the point of view of the owner of the asset)
Set of information for describing the classification of the Document according to ClassificationSystems
Set of information for describing the classification of the Document according to a ClassificationSystem
Unique ID of the document class within a classficationsystem
Name of the class in the classification system
Identification of the classification system
Information elements of individual document instances, which can be different versions of each other
Information about a document instance. This SMC inherits from “DocumentVersion” of IDTA 02004-2-0 “Handover Documentation”
Language of the document instance.
Language of the document
Version of the document
Name of the document
Plain text characterizing the content of the document, e.g., the context of the quality document and its conformity statement.
Date when the document status was set. Usually, the date when the quality document was issued
Each document instance represents a point in time in the asset life cycle. This status value refers to the milestones in the asset life cycle.
Short name of the organization that issued the quality document instance
Official name of the organization that issued the document
Forms a generic refers to-relationship to another document or document instance.
Forms a generic refers to-relationship to another document or document instance
Forms a based on-relationship to another document or document instance
BasedOnReference
MIME-Type, file name and file contents given by the file SubmodelElement. This holds the actual quality document, e.g., the DCC XML file.
MIME-Type, file name and file contents given by the file
Provides a preview of the Document Instance, e.g., the human-readable PDF version of the XML file
This submodel element collection contains essential administrative information about the document.
Contains essential administrative information for the quality document
A worldwide unique identifier for the DQD (e.g., calibration certificate number)
Identifications contains identifiers which exactly describe the content of the parent element
Identification
Name of the identification
Issuer of the identification to distinguish various categories of quality document
Placeholder for the actual identification (e.g., serial number)
Attribute for which the value is unique within the quality document
Reference to an existing ID within the quality document
Specification of a context defining identification. For instance, the temperature measurement can have as context "ambientTemperature"
Date when the document has been officially issued
Contains unique identification, description and if applicable, conditions of the item
Identifications contains identifiers which exactly describe the content of the parent element.
Identification
Name of the identification
Issuer of the identification to distinguish various categories of quality document
Placeholder for the actual identification (e.g., serial number)
Attribute for which the value is unique within the quality document
Reference to an existing ID within the quality document
Specification of a context defining identification. For instance, the temperature measurement can have as context "ambientTemperature"
Item of calibration, conformity assessment or other
Item
Identifications contains identifiers which exactly describe the content of the parent element.
Identification
Name of the identification
Issuer of the identification to distinguish various categories of quality document
Placeholder for the actual identification (e.g., serial number)
Attribute for which the value is unique within the quality document
Reference to an existing ID within the quality document
Specification of a context defining identification. For instance, the temperature measurement can have as context "ambientTemperature"
Contains list of statement records regarding the quality assessment
statement records regarding the quality assessment
Date of statement
Normative or other reference in accordance which the statement is made
Additional information providing context for the statement
Statement of whether the asset is conform with requirements according to the quality document
Information about the electronic signature of the quality document. The semantic structure is based on the W3C schema xmldsig
Information about the signature and the algorithms used
Information about the signature and the algorithms used
Information about the method used for creating the signature
Additional information for processing the signature
Contains the transformations applied to the resource prior to signing
Specifies the hash algorithm before applying the hash
Contains the Base64 encoded result of applying the hash algorithm to the transformed resource

Contains the Base64 encoded result of the hash algorithm, i.e., the signature generated with the parameters specified in the SignatureMethod defined in SignedInfo after applying the algorithm specified by the CanonicalizationMethod
Information to allow the signer to provide recipients with the key that validates the signature, usually in the form of one or more X.509 digital certificates
Digital file associated with the document.

description.text: Name of the manufacturer.

definition.text: legally valid designation of the natural or judicial person which is directly responsible for the design, production, packaging and labeling of a product in respect to its being brought into circulation

description.text: Contains descriptive information about the content of the parent element. This SMC is used in various instances – software, file, previousReport. Note: In future revisions this SMC will be replaced by a proper integration of the information into the respective SMCs using properties from respective Submodel Templates (e.g., Software Nameplate, Handover Documentation)
